member.summary: Interface for extending AnalogMargining Test Method.

member.summary: Providing Ituff data to the user to define the output format.
member.returns: List of IDatalogFormatBase to print to Ituff.

member.summary: The Diagram class, which contains matrix of ctvs.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

Number of columns in the grid.
Char to be used when passing.
Char to be used when failing.

member.param: The row number to set the data.
The column number to set the data.
The ctv logic to be used.

The layout mapping object. The x axis data object. The y axis data object.>

The ssid to be used when printing to ituff.

member.summary: The user sets new data to the gridMapping for each configuration, layout and layer.

The pin name from where the ctvData was taken.
member.returns: Returns true if the layouts were processed successfully.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.AnalogMargining.PrimeAnalogMarginingTestMethod.GetCtvData
member.summary: Executing the functional test and collect the ctvs according to the appropriate pins..
member.returns: dictionary of ctvs data per pin.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.AnalogMargining.PrimeAnalogMarginingTestMethod.ValidateSourceDataMatchingExpectedData(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if the source data we get by execute the plist is matching the expected data we need.
member.param: The size of the source data.

member.summary: Checks all the layout results processed successfully.
member.param: The pin name from where the ctvData was taken.
